zh.lifeSummary: 當Hannah Goodale於1645年5月6日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可薩萊姆時，她的父親Robert Goodale43歲，母親Katharine Kilham41歲。她於1666年5月22日與Lot Kilham在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可文哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1677年5月22日在她的家鄉享年32歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可薩萊姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hannah Goodale于1645年5月6日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可薩萊姆时，她的父亲Robert Goodale43岁，母亲Katharine Kilham41岁。她于1666年5月22日与Lot Kilham在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可文哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1677年5月22日在她的家乡享年32岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可薩萊姆。

nameMeanings.name: Goodale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Goodall  .

variants.name: Goodall
meanings: metonymic occupational name from Middle English god(e) ‘good’ + ale ‘ale’; perhaps denoting an innkeeper or tan ale taster. An ale taster was a manorial or borough court official appointed to regulate the quality of ale sold by inns and alewives, especially with the duty of preventing the sale of sour or watered-down ale.
alternatively, it may be a habitational name from Gowdall near Snaith, in Yorkshire. This place was named in Old English with golde ‘marigold’ + halh ‘nook, recess’.

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Hannah Goodale was born on 6 May 1645, in Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Robert Goodale, was 43 and her mother, Katharine Kilham, was 41. She married Lot Kilham on 22 May 1666, in Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 22 May 1677, in her hometown, at the age of 32, and was buried in Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hannah Goodale est née le 6 mai 1645, à Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Robert Goodale, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Katharine Kilham, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Lot Kilham le 22 mai 1666, à Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 mai 1677, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterrée à Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hannah Goodale am 6. Mai 1645 in Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Goodale 43 und ihre Mutter Katharine Kilham 41. Sie hat am 22. Mai 1666 in Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Lot Kilham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Mai 1677 im Alter von 32 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Goodale è nata il il 6 maggio 1645 nel Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Robert Goodale, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Katharine Kilham, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Lot Kilham il 22 maggio 1666, nel Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 maggio 1677, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolta a Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Hannah Goodaleが1645年5月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスサレムで生まれた時，父Robert Goodaleは43歳，母Katharine Kilhamは41歳であった。1666年5月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスウエンハムでLot Kilhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1677年5月22日に故郷で32歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスサレムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Goodale(이)가 1645년 5월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살렘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Goodale(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katharine Kilham(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1666년 5월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 웬함에서 Lot Kilham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1677년 5월 22일 그녀의 고향에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살렘에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Goodale nasceu em 6 de maio de 1645, em Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Robert Goodale, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Katharine Kilham, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Lot Kilham em 22 de maio de 1666, em Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de maio de 1677, em sua cidade natal, com 32 anos, e foi sepultada em Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hannah Goodale родилась 6 мая 1645 г. в местности сеилем, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Robert Goodale было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Katharine Kilham, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lot Kilham 22 мая 1666 г. в местности венам, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 22 мая 1677 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 32 лет и была похоронена в местности сеилем, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hannah Goodale nació el 6 de mayo de 1645, en Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Robert Goodale, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Katharine Kilham, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Lot Kilham el 22 de mayo de 1666, en Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de mayo de 1677, en su pueblo, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultada en Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
